description: A customer places an order for an item that is out of stock. The agent must inform the customer and provide options.

nodes.task_description: When processing the order, the system flags an item as out of stock.

expected_outcome.value: The system identifies the stockout and places the order on hold.

nodes.task_description: Check the next expected receipt date for the out-of-stock item from open purchase orders.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the item is expected to be back in stock in 7 days.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer, explain the situation, provide the ETA, and ask if they want to wait or cancel the item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the options to the customer, who agrees to wait.
